title: Temporary Aetna Insurance Plan Skill
purpose: Provide Aetna-specific insurance-plan reasoning requirements and evidence expectations for LangGraph skill resolution.

portal_target_policy.notes: The private runtime URL may contain a short-lived Aetna identity transaction and must stay outside Git. The skill owns host policy only; login, 2FA, captcha, form submit, payer contact, and uploads remain human-only approval events.
